languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

languages.text: "Всеотец улыбается воинам, получившим свои раны в бою. Песни их доблести достигают Его первыми".
"The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."
languages.original_text: "Всеотец улыбается воинам, получившим свои раны в бою. Песни их доблести достигают Его первыми".

traits.locale_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."
"The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."
"The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

languages.text: 「全なる父は、戦場で傷を負う戦士に微笑む。彼らの勇気の歌は、他のすべてよりも先に彼に届く」
languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

traits.locale_text: 「全なる父は、戦場で傷を負う戦士に微笑む。彼らの勇気の歌は、他のすべてよりも先に彼に届く。」

languages.text: « Le Père de Tous sourit aux guerriers qui reçoivent leurs blessures au combat. Les chants célébrant leur valeur parviennent à Ses oreilles avant tous les autres. »
languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

traits.locale_text: « Le Père de Tous sourit aux guerriers qui reçoivent leurs blessures au combat. Les chants célébrant leur valeur parviennent à Ses oreilles avant tous les autres. »

languages.text: "Der Allvater lächelt auf Krieger herab, die in der Schlacht verwundet werden. Die Lieder ihrer Tapferkeit erreichen Ihn vor allen anderen."
languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

traits.locale_text: "Der Allvater lächelt auf Krieger herab, die in der Schlacht verwundet werden. Die Lieder ihrer Tapferkeit erreichen Ihn vor allen anderen."

languages.text: "Yücebaba, savaşta yaralanan savaşçılara gülümser. Yiğitliklerinin şarkıları, O'na diğerlerinden önce ulaşır."
languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

traits.locale_text: "Yücebaba, savaşta yaralanan savaşçılara gülümser. Yiğitliklerinin şarkıları, O'na diğerlerinden önce ulaşır."

languages.text: «El Padre de todas las cosas sonríe a los guerreros que reciben sus heridas en combate. Los cantares de su valor llegan a Sus oídos antes que a nadie».
languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

traits.locale_text: «El Padre de todas las cosas sonríe a los guerreros que reciben sus heridas en combate. Los cantares de su valor llegan a Sus oídos antes que a nadie».

languages.text: “全父会眷顾那些在战场上负伤的战士。赞颂他们英勇的歌谣，将最先传至祂的耳畔。”
languages.original_text: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."

traits.locale_text: “全父会眷顾那些在战场上负伤的战士。赞颂他们英勇的歌谣，将最先传至祂的耳畔。”
